title: hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae var. robusta
intro: Hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae var. robusta, also known as the New Zealand pennywort or robust New Zealand peppermint, is a variant of the Hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae plant, which is a type of aquatic or semi-aquatic herb. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its high content of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle novae-zeelandiae var. robusta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote healthy skin and hair. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
